title: Sunday Serrano Ham Pilaf
description: A flavorful pilaf dish featuring the savory taste of serrano and the richness of ham, perfect for a relaxing Sunday meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add diced ham and cook until lightly browned.
Add uncooked pilaf and stir to coat with oil.
Add chopped serrano and cook for 1 minute.
Add salt to taste and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and cover the pan.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the pilaf is cooked.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
